description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CrossBuild that runs on push to master branch and tags starting with 'v', and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to build and test on multiple architectures: i686, aarch64, riscv64, powerpc, powerpc64, powerpc64le, s390x, sparc64, m68k, sh4, and alpha. For each architecture, install cross-tools, build with CMake and GCC 10, and test using QEMU.
